comes from the Claim HRR Participant Indicator code (CLM-HRR-PRTCPNT-IND-CD) that is 
present on the first claim record included in the stay. If there is no Claim HRR Participant Indicator code 
on the first claim, then the first found code on any of the other claims that make up the stay is used. 

This field is new in 2012.
